### Post by tehk on 2009-10-07
I thought this problem would go away when I first discovered it back in August, but alas it has not. It appears that after ever boot, the /etc/resolv.conf file in my Karmic upgraded system it completely emptied. It has one line in it after each boot:

# Generated by NetworkManager

and all my nameservers lines are gone. I've had to resort to keeping a copy of the good file as /etc/resolv.conf_ and overwriting the bad file after each boot.

Any help as to what's going on here?

---

### Post by inportb on 2009-10-07
It looks like you might need a static entry with NetworkManager.

---

### Post by tehk on 2009-10-07
seems reasonable. i created a new entry and set it to connect automatically on, so i guess this will happen on the next boot. but, ive got some coding to do, so that will have to wait til later. ill post back if its still a problem.
